# Wallet Implementing Act Annex

## Annex I Section 2.4 Registration certificate data fields
The annex lists the minimum fields that a registration certificate should carry when the certificate is required by the governing Union act.

## Annex I Section 2.5 Access certificate data fields
The annex also lists the minimum access-certificate data fields for relying-party access flows.

## Annex I Section 2.7 Audit references
Implementing material supplements the regulation but does not override the regulation.
